## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

Explain how this was tested.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and scoped.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if needed.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private data, or unrelated generated files are included.
- [ ] Licensing of any added third-party code or assets is clear.
